arts.ttl: Tel prefers Man Utd move but Arsenal still in race - Sky Germany
arts.sum: Bayern Munich forward Mathys Tel's preference is to join Manchester United before the transfer deadline, reports Sky in Germany.

arts.ttl: Manchester United 0-2 Crystal Palace: Player Ratings With Lisandro Martinez Injury a Major Concern
arts.sum: Manchester United could be without their best defender for a significant period after Lisandro Martinez was stretchered off in the second half.

arts.ttl: Manchester United punished by Mateta double in defeat by Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim’s wish to “create some danger” flamed at the start of each half, then faded, as Manchester United were sucker-punched by Jean-Philippe Mateta’s second goal on 89 minutes that sealed a first defeat in four games. United and Crystal Palace were becalmed before goal except for when the Eagles twice took advantage of the home side’s slipshop backline. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Mathys Tel 'AGREES to join Manchester United', reports in Germany claim, as £50m Bayern Munich star picks Old Trafford over Premier League rivals
arts.sum: Mathys Tel has reportedly chosen Manchester United as his next club, with Sky Germany claiming the Red Devils have convinced the Frenchman to join them over another Premier League rival.

arts.ttl: Man Utd 0-2 Crystal Palace: Match report & 3 talking points from limp Old Trafford defeat
arts.sum: Full analysis and takeaways as Manchester United slipped up at home once more, this time losing 2-0 to Crystal Palace.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace enjoy dream day as Jean-Philippe Mateta puts Manchester United's struggles into perspective
arts.sum: The Eagles climb up the Premier League table with a deserved in at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Amorim admits Crystal Palace defeat ‘really bad’ for Man United
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has admitted Manchester United’s 2-0 home defeat to Crystal Palace is a ‘really bad’ result for the club. Manchester United lost on home soil for the seventh time in 13 league games this season as Palace recorded a 2-0 win at Old Trafford. arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim issues Lisandro Martinez injury update as Man Utd star stretchered off in tears
arts.sum: The defender was taken off in severe pain after treatment on the Old Trafford pitch after picking up a knee injury following an awkward turn

arts.ttl: Man Utd experiment blows up in Ruben Amorim's face as he waits for agreement to expire
arts.sum: Manchester United have let Marcus Rashford leave for Aston Villa, Ruben Amorim is increasingly frustrated with his other striking options and playing Kobbie Mainoo in attack against Crystal Palace certainly wasn't the answer

arts.ttl: Man United 0-2 Crystal Palace PLAYER RATINGS: Who is suffering from Ruben Amorim's 'dithering'? Which player 'lost his way'? And who should fear for their place in the team now?
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim's wait for back-to-back Premier League games goes on. Mail Sport's NATHAN SALT was in attendance at Old Trafford to run the rule over Amorim's side…
